gmail_label_query_note: Use label:Avaris (display name) in Gmail search_threads queries, not label:Label_1 (the ID) — the ID form returns zero results even though list_labels reports it correctly.
notes: gmail_cursor is the timestamp of the newest alert email processed so far; each daily run should only consider messages newer than this, then advance it. UNGM Tender Alert Service (TAS) delivered its first live notice on 2026-07-22 (sender no-reply@ungm.org, subject 'Tender Alert Service (TAS)') — the subscription is confirmed working. First tender was off-topic (ILO migrant-labor policy paper), suggesting the TAS keyword/category settings may need tuning toward finance/sovereign-debt/MENA. Umbrex declined membership application (doesn't currently meet full-time-consulting criteria). MoveMeOn has full access granted but not yet sending brief-text alerts. BTG occasionally sends 'new projects available' notifications with no brief text; need manual portal login to review. Catalant confirmed to actively match/decline him on real projects even though it never emails full brief text.
upwork_alert_noise_note: Across 5 runs, most daily Upwork alerts have been sales/BD/SDR/admin roles or scam-tier/unrealistic fixed-price gigs (e.g. $100 for a full pre-seed financial model). Recommend the user tighten Upwork alert keyword/rate settings if this pattern continues — no ready-to-apply Upwork gig has cleared both fit and pay floor in 5 consecutive runs.
